highlights.text: Zurich (2N) → Lucerne (2N) → Interlaken (3N) → Zermatt (2N) ultra-luxury circuit
VIP Zurich discovery & exclusive Mt. Titlis summit access
Luxury scenic rail journey & Jungfraujoch VIP expedition
Matterhorn elite experience & farewell gala dinner

itinerary.title: Luxury Switzerland Tour
itinerary.tagline: Zurich • Lucerne • Interlaken • Zermatt • Exclusive Rail Journeys
itinerary.overview: Indulge in the absolute height of sophistication across Switzerland with TRAGUIN's curated luxury expedition. From opulent five-star stays and world-class alpine resorts to exclusive private rail journeys and elite culinary experiences, this journey is designed for the discerning traveler — ensuring unforgettable memories in ultimate luxury across Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zermatt.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 08 Nights / 09 Days Switzerland package (CH-003): Baur au Lac, Bürgenstock, Victoria-Jungfrau, The Omnia, Mt. Titlis, Jungfraujoch, and Matterhorn experiences.

days.title: VIP Arrival & Zurich Luxury
days.description: Arrive in Zurich. VIP chauffeur transfer to your world-class hotel. Evening gourmet welcome dinner overlooking the lake.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private hotel transfer

days.title: Exclusive Zurich Discovery
days.description: Private guided tour of Zurich's most prestigious districts, boutique shopping, and cultural landmarks — an exclusive experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private guided Zurich city tour

days.title: Transfer to Lucerne
days.description: VIP transfer to Lucerne. Check into a premium lakeside palace hotel. Afternoon private lake cruise with gourmet catering.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private lake cruise with gourmet catering

days.title: Mt. Titlis Exclusive Access
days.description: Private cable car access to Mt. Titlis summit. Enjoy personal guiding, premium snow experiences, and gourmet dining at the top.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mt. Titlis private summit access, personal guiding

days.title: Scenic Rail to Interlaken
days.description: Embark on an exclusive luxury scenic rail journey to Interlaken. Check into an ultra-luxury alpine retreat.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Luxury scenic rail journey to Interlaken
Overnight Stay: Interlaken (Victoria-Jungfrau Grand Hotel & Spa)

days.title: Jungfraujoch VIP Expedition
days.description: Private VIP expedition to Jungfraujoch — the Top of Europe. Enjoy personalized guiding and unparalleled panoramic views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jungfraujoch VIP private expedition
Overnight Stay: Interlaken (Victoria-Jungfrau Grand Hotel & Spa)

days.title: Transfer to Zermatt
days.description: Transfer to Zermatt. Check into an ultra-luxury boutique suite with iconic Matterhorn views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic transfer to Zermatt

days.title: Matterhorn Elite Experience
days.description: Private leisure day in Zermatt, boutique shopping, and a farewell gala dinner celebrating your luxury Swiss expedition.

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast. VIP chauffeur transfer to the airport, concluding your premium Switzerland luxury expedition.

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in ultra-luxury hotels across Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zermatt
VIP chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Exclusive luxury scenic rail journey to Interlaken
Mt. Titlis private summit access with personal guiding
Jungfraujoch VIP private expedition to the Top of Europe
Private lake cruise with gourmet catering in Lucerne
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated luxury travel concierge support
International airfare and Switzerland entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
